chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2223 of 2022 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For orders on Misc. No.9987/2022 (U/A) 2. For orders on Misc. No.9988/2022 (Ex/A). 3. For orders on Misc. No.9989/2022 (Stay) 4. For hearing of main case -------------------------------------------------------------- 08.04.2022. Mr. Madan Lal, Advocate for the petitioner. >><< 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 3-4. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, Advocate present in Court has waived notice on behalf of the respondents. As per the learned counsel, the Revision Application against the impugned Ruling is pending before the Director General Valuation. He states that the petitioner is willing to secure the differential amount of duties and taxes with the Collector of Customs (Respondents No.4). In the circumstances, by way of an interim arrangement since the consignment is securing storage charges at the port, let the undisputed quantum of duties and taxes be deposited with the Collectorate / Department and the disputed amount of the duties and taxes be secured before the Collector of Customs (Respondent No.4) by way of pay order(s) /Bank guarantee in respect of the consignment(s) stipulated supra. Upon deposit of the undisputed quantum of dues and taxes with the Collectorate / Department and presentation of the certificate(s) issued by the Collector of Customs (Respondent No.4), the concerned Collectorate / Department shall release the consignment(s) forthwith.

In the circumstances, by way of an interim arrangement since the consignment is securing storage charges at the port, let the undisputed quantum of duties and taxes be deposited with the Collectorate / Department and the disputed amount of the duties and taxes be secured before the Collector of Customs (Respondent No.4) by way of pay order(s) /Bank guarantee in respect of the consignment(s) stipulated supra. Upon deposit of the undisputed quantum of dues and taxes with the Collectorate / Department and presentation of the certificate(s) issued by the Collector of Customs (Respondent No.4), the concerned Collectorate / Department shall release the consignment(s) forthwith. The fate of amount secured supra shall be subject to the outcome of the Revision Application pending before the Director General Valuation. This petition, along with pending application(s) is disposed of in terms herein. JUDGE JUDGE Gulzar/PA
